name: cache layer: --cache-stats emits {hits, misses, invalidations, bytes} JSON to stderr
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/cli.sh" --rule no-eval --in "$PWD/f.js" --cache --cache-location "$PWD/.cache" --cache-stats 2>out.json && grep -E '"hits":[0-9]+.*"misses":[0-9]+' out.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
